full_text:
Ying Chang (Delian)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ying Chang, styledDelian, was born in Runan. Part of the Cao family literary circles, a poet who wrote a treatise on Go. One of Cao Pi’s Seven Masters. Ying Chang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Ying Chang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
